title: Cobblemon Essentials [1.7.3]
description: Pokemon in Minecraft with exciting new features added!✨ Explore Pokémon towns, ride on Pokémon,  challenge Gym Leaders, collect Pokémon plushies, and so much more!
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f63d072aac3d179eb07df1194d338911f78d07eb.png)
### <center>Cobblemon Essentials is the best Cobblemon Modpack for Fabric.</center>
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d04fb4301706a6bf8528d19a7a25a7e07ca7fb20.png)

### Server Features
- All the Pokemons!
- Begin your journey with your **Shiny Starter**, a backpack, and a Pokédex—adventure awaits!  
- **Ride** your favorite Pokémon and strengthen your bond as you travel together.  
- Challenge **Gym** leaders, earn medals, and claim the title of Pokémon Champion!  
- Earn free ranks and crate keys by voting and staying active on the server.  
- Hear that roar in the distance? Legendary Pokémon appear here, so stay alert!  
- Join Pokémon GO-style **Raids** to defeat Bosses and snag amazing rewards!
  
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d04fb4301706a6bf8528d19a7a25a7e07ca7fb20.png)

### Cobblemon Side-Mods
The server in this modpack includes +20 Cobblemon sidemods to take your journey to the next level!

🛡️ ᴍᴇɢᴀ ᴇᴠᴏʟᴜᴛɪᴏɴ
Unlock the feature of Mega Evolving with stones thanks to the [Ascension Megamons](https://modrinth.com/mod/ascension-megamons) addon.

🐉 ᴍʏᴛʜꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ʟᴇɢᴇɴᴅꜱ
Encounter Legendary and Mythical Pokémon with new key items and spawning conditions through [Cobblemon Myths and Legends](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-myths-and-legends-addon).

⚔️ ᴅʏɴᴀᴍɪᴄ ɪɴᴛᴇʀᴀᴄᴛɪᴏɴꜱ
Experience a more immersive world where Pokémon will either flee or fight back when provoked, thanks to [Cobblemon - Fight or Flight](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-fight-or-flight).

🚨 ꜱʜɪɴʏ ᴀʟᴇʀᴛꜱ
Never miss a Legendary or Shiny Cobblemon spawn with [Cobblemon Spawn Notification](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-spawn-notification).

🌟 ᴇɴʜᴀɴᴄᴇᴅ ꜱᴘᴀᴡɴɪɴɢ
Enjoy naturally spawning Hidden Abilities and increased shiny rates near your KOs and captures with [Cobblemon Unchained](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-unchained).

💿 ᴛᴍꜱ ᴀɴᴅ ᴛʀꜱ
Teach moves to your Pokémon using TMs and TRs with [SimpleTMs: TMs and TRs for Cobblemon.](https://modrinth.com/mod/simpletms-tms-and-trs-for-cobblemon).

📈 ᴄᴀᴘᴛᴜʀᴇ xᴘ
Grant EXP to your team when you capture a wild Pokémon with [Cobblemon Capture XP](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-capture-xp).

🥚 ᴘᴏᴋᴇ́ᴍᴏɴ ʙʀᴇᴇᴅɪɴɢ
Enable early Pokémon breeding with [Cobbreeding](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobbreeding).

📊 ᴄᴏᴍᴘʀᴇʜᴇɴꜱɪᴠᴇ ᴛʀᴀᴄᴋɪɴɢ
Keep meticulous records of your wild Cobblemon encounters and achievements with [Cobblemon Counter](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-counter).

🏥 ᴄᴜꜱᴛᴏᴍ ᴘᴏᴋᴇ́ᴄᴇɴᴛᴇʀꜱ
Discover and utilize custom-built Pokécenters in Vanilla Villages with [Fuller's Pokecenters](https://modrinth.com/mod/fullers-pokecenters).

📚 ɪɴ-ɢᴀᴍᴇ ᴡɪᴋɪ
Access a detailed in-game Pokémon encyclopedia using [Cobblepedia](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblepedia).

🛠️ ᴜɴɪᴍᴘʟᴇᴍᴇɴᴛᴇᴅ ɪᴛᴇᴍꜱ
Add items that don't exist in Cobblemon yet with [Cobblemon Unimplemented Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon-unimplemented-items).

![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d04fb4301706a6bf8528d19a7a25a7e07ca7fb20.png)

### Resource/Shader Packs
- [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-interface): Makes Minecraft's interface and sounds fit the Cobblemon mod aesthetics.
- [Cobblemon Emissive Ores](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-emissive-ores): Help you find those tough-to-see ores lurking in water, or on the cave roof.
- [Cobblemon Classic Grass Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-classic-grass-pack): Replaces the grass to a more inspired in Pokémon.
and the minecraft tall grass replacement texture is highly inspired by
the long grass from Pokémon Ruby & Sapphire & Emerald.
- [Cobblemon - GS Apricorn Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/cobblemon-gs-apricorn-leaves): Replaces the Cobblemon Apricorn leaves with a softer texture.
- [3D Crops Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-crops): Simply turns your crops into 3D blocks!
- [PokePlaques](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/pokeplaques-cobblemon): Integrates with the Advancement Plaques mod bringing a new Pokémon themed achievements GUI.
- [BSL Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders): Shaderpack for Minecraft: Java Edition. It's bright, colorful, and distinct.
- [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound): Transforming the visuals of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance.
- [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined): Preserving the elements of Minecraft with exceptional quality, detail, and performance.
